_comment: PTERODACTYL: Update URL is used for Pelican
name: scpsl-egg
author: upwordstudent@gmail.com
description: A customizable egg for the SCP: Secret Laboratory Dedicated Linux server builds.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-installer - downloads latest script.sh from GitHub
set -e
echo "=== SCP:SL Egg Installer (auto-update) ==="
echo "Downloading latest installer from Reddishye/scpsl-egg..."
wget -qO /tmp/scpsl-install.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Reddishye/scpsl-egg/master/script.sh" || {
    echo "ERROR: Failed to download installer from GitHub"
    exit 1
}
chmod +x /tmp/scpsl-install.sh
exec bash /tmp/scpsl-install.sh

variables.name: Branch Tag
variables.description:
Keep empty for public branch.
For branches with passwords add "-branchpassword " before the password.

variables.name: Use EXILED Pre-Releases?
variables.description:
Allows you to install the latest Pre-Release of EXILED.
To install a specific version, replace with the specified EXILED version.

variables.name: Install SCPDiscord?
variables.description: This will install the SCPDiscord Bot and start it alongside the SL server.

variables.name: Install SCPDiscord Plugin?
variables.description: Disable if you use a plugin manager. The plugin will be installed for LabAPI.

variables.name: Log Retention Days
variables.description: Number of days to keep server logs. Older logs are automatically deleted.

variables.name: Debug Mode
variables.description: Enable verbose debug output (SSL diag, etc.)

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Check for SCP:SL updates on every server start via DepotDownloader

variables.name: Max Retries
variables.description: Max server restart attempts on crash. 0 = unlimited (always restart)

variables.name: Retry Delay
variables.description: Seconds to wait between restart attempts
